description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin constructed primarily from weathered wood, featuring a simple rectangular structure and a dark, gabled roof. The cabin has a single large square window on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side walls are solid, with no visible windows or doors, while the front facade includes a prominent window and a door beneath the roof overhang. The wood exterior appears aged and textured, giving the cabin a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for rural or park settings. The roof is a classic gable style, slightly overhanging the walls for added protection from the elements. The overall design is functional and unadorned, emphasizing practicality over decorative elements.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a dark gabled roof, large square windows, and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance and a large square window beneath the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_1: Side and rear view displaying the solid wooden wall and the rear gable end with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a large square window centered on the back wall and the sloped roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side and rear view showing the solid side wall and the rear gable end.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, constructed from dark shingles or wood planks, slight overhang on all sides
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large square windows, one centered on the front facade and one on the rear, symmetrically placed and of equal size
attribute_door_placement: Single door located on the front facade beneath the roof overhang, adjacent to the front window
